purpose: Upgrade validation so a technically correct but visually near-static Attack cannot pass as production-ready.
technicalChecksToRetain: repository identity and exact source chain
PNG decode, dimensions, RGBA and alpha

machineEvidence: pairwise changed-region bounding boxes for semantic key frames
documented distinct-pose clusters or held-pose intent
poseDiversity.rule: Unique SHA-256 values are not a substitute for meaningful pose diversity.

machineEvidence: annotated or measured shoulder/elbow/drawing-hand landmarks on ready, draw-mid, full-draw, release
arm-region centroid as secondary metric only
armArticulation.rule: Validator must reject evidence that shows only subpixel centroid wobble without visible joint articulation.

fullDrawDistinction.compare: frame004 full draw vs frame000 ready/neutral
fullDrawDistinction.rule: Full-draw distinction must be semantic and visibly readable, not merely nonzero pixel delta.

releaseDistinction.compare: actual full-draw frame vs actual release frame
releaseDistinction.rule: Largest adjacent pixel delta alone cannot prove a release pose.

followThroughDistinction.rule: At least one visible follow-through pose must remain distinct from release and neutral.

evidence: board-scale sequence preview or sample set without projectile VFX
boardScaleReadability.rule: Character motion alone must read as Archer bow attack.

comparativeMetrics.thresholdRule: Use normalized comparative evidence; do not invent a hard absolute threshold solely to make validation pass.
comparativeMetrics.passDirection: Attack v2 evidence must be materially closer to old CLEAR articulation/readability than to rejected PR #67 near-static behavior.

requiredQuestions: เห็นยกธนูไหม
เห็นง้างสายไหม
เห็น full draw ชัดไหม
เห็นปล่อยลูกศรไหม
เห็น follow-through ไหม
ยังเป็น Archer ตัวเดิมไหม
ที่ board scale ยังอ่านออกไหม
humanGate.hardFailureRule: If questions 2-5 are not clearly YES, exact-file approval is forbidden.
